observations.axis: Choice between cold fire of the star and warm rot of the sea
observations.polarity: Cold fire of the star vs. warm rot of the sea
observations.summary: Dan chooses the cold fire of the star, symbolizing a harsh, ascetic path, over the warm rot of the sea, symbolizing decay and comfort, reflecting his internal division and conflict.

left_evidence.quote: He had chosen the cold fire of the star over the warm rot of the sea.

right_evidence.quote: The house was divided against itself, and so was he.

bridge_evidence.quote: He lay back down. His shadow against the wall was enormous and hunched—a shape barely recognizable as a boy.

observations.axis: Sleep as rest vs. sleep as unrest
observations.polarity: Dan's restless sleep vs. father's restless sleep
observations.summary: Both Dan and his father share the same kind of sleep, which brings no rest, symbolizing shared burden and unresolved struggle.

left_evidence.quote: Dan's sleep would bring him no more rest than his father's.

right_evidence.quote: They were sleeping the same sleep now.

bridge_evidence.quote: The cost of testing it was written in every tight muscle and leaden limb.
